law: 100 shippable units for sourcea.app Brain — retrieval-first, not keyword chatbot.

plans.title: Corpus manifest SSOT
plans.summary: Single manifest listing every allowed public source, lane, hash, and distill path.
plans.acceptance: Corpus manifest SSOT verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Public copy ingest
plans.summary: Export positioning JSON, founder-home, and locked positioning law into chunked markdown.
plans.acceptance: Public copy ingest verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: FAQ pack
plans.summary: Distill live FAQ / scenario / offer pages into Q/A pairs with canonical www_url metadata.
plans.acceptance: FAQ pack verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: API surface ingest
plans.summary: Ingest public developer pages, kernel docs, and OpenAPI slice for procedural answers.
plans.acceptance: API surface ingest verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.summary: Distill brain-public-rules-v1.json into rule lane chunks — retrieved, not prompt-dumped.
plans.acceptance: Public rules guardrail snippets verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.summary: Auto-regenerate llms.txt and sitemap brain summary from manifest on corpus rebuild.
plans.acceptance: llms.txt + sitemap sync verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.acceptance: Forbidden corpus denylist verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Chunk strategy

plans.acceptance: Chunk strategy verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Verify gate

plans.acceptance: Verify gate verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.acceptance: Embedding provider verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Vector store

plans.acceptance: Vector store verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Hybrid BM25 + vector merge
plans.summary: BM25 + page boost + semantic vector score merged in Worker ranking.
plans.acceptance: Hybrid BM25 + vector merge verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Retriever service
plans.summary: Shared retrieve() API in Python hub + JS worker with identical ranking semantics.
plans.acceptance: Retriever service verified on sourcea.app Brain stack.

plans.title: Page-aware boost
plans.summary: Widget sends page_path and data-sa-page; boost chunks matching current route.

plans.title: Citation objects

plans.title: ChatBrain service
plans.summary: Replace any keyword branches with retrieve→assemble→generate pipeline.
